title: PTC Inc. (PTC) Misses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: PTC Inc. (PTC) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.99 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.01 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.97 per share a year ago.

title: PTC Announces CEO Succession Plan

title: PTC to Announce Fiscal Q3'23 Results on Wednesday, July 26th, 2023
text: BOSTON , July 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (Nasdaq: PTC) will release its fiscal 2023 third quarter results on Wednesday, July 26 th after the stock market closes.
